creator: bcran@FreeBSD.org
text:
Marcelo Araujo (araujo@) has indicated via email that he no longer has any interest in Bhyve, or the time to work on it. And that I should take over maintaining his ports.

As part of this, I'd like to gain access to update/administer the uefi-edk2 repository on GitHub (https://github.com/freebsd/uefi-edk2) in order to push changes, change the default branch (e.g. from master to bhyve/edk2-stable201903) please.
